description: validate an assembled ChangeNet training CSV before launching training (read-only preflight)
rules: checks required columns (input_path, golden_path, label, object_name) and a non-empty body
resolves every input_path/golden_path on disk via TAO siamese layout images_dir/input_path/object_name_light.ext (or flat when object_name absent); any missing file is a hard stop
PASS-preserving label rule: label 'PASS' must stay verbatim; every other label must be lowercase+stripped
with VALIDATION_CSV set, diffs train vs validation on shared keys and hard-stops on any train/val leak
stdlib-only (no pandas); run between CSV assembly and the training docker invocation
usage: Set CSV (assembled training CSV), WORKSPACE_ROOT (relative paths resolve against it), and RECORD_STORE. Optional: VALIDATION_CSV (leakage check), LIGHT (default SolderLight), IMAGE_EXT (default .jpg). The full report is written to ${RECORD_STORE}/validation_report.txt; the core exits non-zero on any validation failure (captured in the report).
limitation: Read-only schema/existence/leakage validation; does not assemble, fix, or train on the CSV. Requires the referenced images to be present on disk for a clean pass.
